description_long: This briefcase features a striking design with a pastel marbled pattern in shades of lavender, pink, and white on the flap and rear panel, contrasted by a solid black lower section. The front flap is secured with a small, rectangular, silver-toned clasp at the center, adding a touch of modernity. The body of the briefcase appears to be made from a textured, leather-like material, while the flap has a smooth, printed finish. There is a small, rectangular label or tag on the lower right corner of the front, possibly indicating a brand. The sides are slim and taper towards the bottom, giving the briefcase a sleek, envelope-style silhouette. No external pockets or reinforcements are visible, and the overall construction suggests a lightweight, portable accessory suitable for carrying documents or small personal items.
description: A sleek, envelope-style briefcase with a pastel marbled flap and a solid black body, secured by a silver clasp. The design is modern and minimal, with no visible external pockets or reinforcements.
description_view_0: Front view shows the marbled flap, black body, central silver clasp, and a small label on the lower right.
description_view_1: Left side view reveals the slim, tapered profile and the overlap of the flap over the body.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the full marbled pattern across the back panel, with no visible hardware or pockets.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, highlighting the thinness and clean lines of the briefcase.
attribute_handle_type: None visible; the briefcase does not appear to have an external handle.
attribute_lock_mechanism: Rectangular silver clasp located at the center of the front flap; appears to be a push or snap closure.
attribute_brand_logo: A small rectangular label is visible on the lower right front, but the brand is not identifiable.
